# Bello Language Project

Bello is a Go-to-Go source-to-source transpiler. It parses Minion-speak `.🍌` syntax, rewrites tokens to Go, emits Go code, then runs Go toolchain commands.

## Repository layout
- `cmd/bello/main.go` CLI dispatcher and command implementation.
- `pkg/lexer` token stream implementation and tests.
- `pkg/parser` Bello lexer wrapper + Go parser bridge + AST conversion.
- `pkg/transformer` keyword/predeclared/stdlib rewriting and Go AST rewrite pass.
- `pkg/emitter` Go source emission and position mapping utilities.
- `pkg/module` `bello.🍑` parser and renderer.
- `testdata/` sample Bello fixtures.

## Important commands
- `go run ./cmd/bello papala <file.🍌>`
- `go run ./cmd/bello construccion [dir]`
- `go run ./cmd/bello kanpai [dir]`
- `go run ./cmd/bello sniff [dir]`
- `go run ./cmd/bello bonito <file.🍌>`
- `go run ./cmd/bello completion [bash|zsh|fish]`
- `go run ./cmd/bello bootstrap .`
- `go run ./cmd/bello modulo init <name>`
- `go run ./cmd/bello dame <pkg>`
- `go run ./cmd/bello splain`

## Current status
- CLI, lexer/parser bridge, transformer, emitter, module parsing, and integration tests are implemented.
- `go test ./...` is the baseline validation command.
- CI runs `go test ./...` on push/PR.

## Error format
Diagnostics use `BEE DOH! <file>:<line>:<col> — <message>` with `POOPAYE! ...` summaries on failures.
